changelog: Fix: DramaShorts showed 'Unknown Series' (site moved movie fields under movieDetails.movie)
Fix: DramaReels re-downloads now self-heal — files are verified against the remote size instead of being skipped, so old/duplicate clips get replaced
Fix: StardustTV no longer flashes console windows during downloads (ffmpeg hidden)
Simple UI: added a full per-episode Download Log (with Copy Log) so errors are easy to find
Simple UI: new 'Error Eps' column shows exactly which episodes failed for each title
Simple UI: platform logos are now clickable and open the platform website
Simple UI: removed the Switch-to-Classic button and the WeTV + DramaReels logos
Build: 42/42 tests pass, all touched modules compile clean
